parameters.query:
SELECT
    (
        SELECT id
        FROM public.profissionais
        WHERE $1 != ''
        ORDER BY nome <-> $1
        LIMIT 1
    ) AS profesional_id_real,
    (
        SELECT id
        FROM public.convenios
        WHERE $2 != ''
          AND $3 = false
        ORDER BY convenio <-> $2
        LIMIT 1
    ) AS convenio_id_real;

SELECT token, expires_at
FROM config_tokens
WHERE service = 'igut_api'
  AND expires_at > NOW()
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO pacientes (nome, cpf, telefone_principal, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2,
  NULLIF($3, ''),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (cpf) DO UPDATE SET
  nome = CASE
    WHEN pacientes.nome LIKE 'Paciente %' THEN EXCLUDED.nome
    ELSE pacientes.nome
  END,
  telefone_principal = COALESCE(
    NULLIF(EXCLUDED.telefone_principal, ''),
    pacientes.telefone_principal
  ),
  updated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO public.agendamentos (
    convenio_id,
    profissional_id,
    tipo_atendimento_id,
    data_atendimento,
    horario,
    unidade_id,
    paciente_cpf,
    status
)
VALUES (
    NULLIF($1, '')::bigint,
    $2::bigint,
    $3::integer,
    $4::date,
    $5::time,
    1,
    $6,
    'agendado'
)
RETURNING id, paciente_cpf, data_atendimento, horario, status;
